name: Tomato and Mozzarella Bruschetta
recipeIngredient: 2 tbsp balsamic vinegar or red wine vinegar
recipeInstructions:
Preheat the broiler. In a large bowl, combine the chopped tomatoes, onion, capers, basil, and mozzarella. Stir in the balsamic vinegar or red wine vinegar and olive oil. Season with salt and pepper. Top each slice of toasted bread with the mixture and place on a baking sheet. Broil until the cheese melts. Serve hot.
Alternative: Substitute 1 cup canned northern white beans for the cheese, and simply top the toasts with the mixture.
